home.tagline: Wardio's League of Legends statistics: tier lists by role, win-rate-weighted builds, counters and duos — recomputed every patch from real ranked games.

tiers.b: A ranking per role, relative to the role rather than to an absolute threshold, with pick rate, ban rate and the win-rate change since the previous patch.

builds.b: Several builds per champion, clustered by keystone and sorted by win rate — runes, spells, skill order and items, each with its own.

matchups.b: Counters computed from same-position matchups, and the best duos from same-team wins.

modes.b: Summoner's Rift and ARAM, aggregated separately — the Howling Abyss has its own balance, so it gets its own numbers.

method.b: A batch job queries Riot's public API each patch cycle, aggregates ranked games and publishes a static file. Win rates are shrunk toward 50 % by sample size, so a handful of games does not read as a certainty. Nothing is extrapolated: what is missing stays empty.

champions.title: Champions
champions.noData: No tier data for this role yet.

detail.noChampion: No data for this champion yet.
